title: Amtech B3771 1000 6mm Staples
features: USE WITH AMTECH B3770: This pack of 1000 6mm staples is suitable for use with Amtech's staple gun (stock code B3770)
HEAVY-DUTY BUILD: Made from robust materials to withstand regular use.
PRACTICAL SIZE: 6mm length provides reach and stability.
PRECISION CONTROL: Easy to handle with good balance for accurate work.
LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN: Easy to store, making it a practical addition to any toolbox.
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 1000Pc 6Mm Staples See more
